_note: These are example Sextant hooks for Claude Code settings.json. Copy the 'hooks' array entries into your ~/.claude/settings.json or <project>/.claude/settings.json. Do NOT enable these in the Sextant repo itself — they are intended for projects that use Sextant.

hooks.command:
echo '
[Sextant] Session ending. If you completed a Build stage, run /sextant-verify before closing. If Verify passed, run /sextant-record to close the task.'

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then TASK_DIR=$(ls -dt .sextant/traces/*/  2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$TASK_DIR" ]; then REVIEW="${TASK_DIR}review-build.md"; if [ ! -f "$REVIEW" ]; then echo '[Sextant WARNING] No build review found. Run /sextant-verify before committing.'; elif ! grep -q 'deletion_proposals' "$REVIEW"; then echo '[Sextant WARNING] review-build.md is missing the deletion_proposals field. Review artifact is malformed.'; fi; fi; fi
